reasoning: XLK +0.61% and XLF +0.73% leading while XLE -1.48% dragging = classic risk-on rotation heading into market open. Tech and financials are outperforming SPY (+0.61%/+0.73% vs +0.4%), confirming growth + financial sector leadership. VIX falling -8.03% to 18.66 reinforces risk-on momentum. Sector breadth is narrow but directionally bullish — 2 of 3 major sectors aligned long. SPY upside supported by this rotation.
key_observations: XLK: +0.61% — tech leading premarket, outperforming SPY by 21bps
XLF: +0.73% — financials strongest, outperforming SPY by 33bps
XLE: -1.48% — energy weakness, classic risk-off defense sector drag
Overall rotation: strong risk-on (growth + financial leadership, energy rollover). Supports SPY bullish directional trade.
